case_title: BEVERET FAYE et al VS WOODS KEVIN OWNER OF WOODS CONSTRUCTION CO.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BEVERET FAYE BARON JOHN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WOODS KEVIN OWNER OF WOODS CONSTRUCTION CO. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,015.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BEVERET FAYE BARON JOHN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WOODS KEVIN OWNER OF WOODS CONSTRUCTION CO. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,015.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BEVERET FAYE BARON JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT WOODS KEVIN OWNER OF WOODS CONSTRUCTION CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-06-1995 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C

SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT CONTINUED FROM JAN-12-1996 TO FEB-16-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF FEB-16-1996, GRANTED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BEVERET FAYE BARON JOHN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WOODS KEVIN OWNER OF WOODS CONSTRUCTION CO. JUDGM. ENTERED IN SCA 24506 ON 5-29-96. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
